mano_cua.result_summary: 矩形旋转45°后右键菜单位置严重偏移。三次测试均显示菜单未出现在鼠标点击位置：左顶点点击(550,435)→菜单出现在(597,550)，偏移47px右+115px下。根因是右键菜单位置计算未处理 CSS rotation transform，基于未旋转坐标系计算。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This screenshot clearly demonstrates the bug. Component rotated 45° (diamond shape). Right-clicked at (550, 435) (LEFT vertex of diamond) → Context menu appeared at approximately (597, 550) - menu appeared ~47px to the right and ~115px BELOW the click point. The context menu position calculation does NOT use the actual mouse cursor position. Instead, it calculates position based on the component's unrotated coordinate space.
